description_long: This object consists of two whole oranges and one orange half, all with a slightly dimpled, orange-colored rind. The whole oranges are round with a small, greenish stem remnant on top, and their surfaces display subtle, lighter speckles typical of citrus fruit. The cut half reveals a pale yellow-orange interior with a central white pith and radiating segments, each separated by thin membranes. The flesh appears juicy and slightly translucent, with a realistic fibrous texture. The overall appearance suggests freshness and ripeness, with the oranges likely to be sweet and aromatic. The group is arranged closely together, as if freshly picked or prepared for display.
description: A group of two whole oranges and one cut half, showing a dimpled orange rind and a juicy, segmented interior.
description_view_0: Two whole oranges and a cut half are visible, with the cut surface of the half facing forward, displaying the segmented interior.
description_view_1: The cut half is angled, showing both the rind and the juicy interior, while the whole oranges are seen from the side.
description_view_2: The back of the whole oranges is visible, with the cut half mostly showing its rind and only a sliver of the interior.
description_view_3: The tops of the whole oranges are prominent, with the cut half standing upright, exposing its interior from the side.
attribute_location_or_placement: outdoor market stall, park picnic table, street vendor cart
